WHERE people.sex = 'M' AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976' AND candidate.consider_rate >= 0.3 AND people.name = 'Hubert Henno'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with sex equal to 'M' and date of birth equal to '06.10.1976' and name equal to 'Hubert Henno', having at least one related candidate record (linked on people.people_id = candidate.people_id) with consider rate at least '0.3'?

qa_pairs.question: Who born exactly on 03.02.1976 and no taller than 200.0 cm have candidates with a poll source of WNBC/Marist Poll and a consider rate at most 0.42?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.42 AND people.date_of_birth = '03.02.1976' AND people.height <= 200.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with date of birth equal to '03.02.1976' and height at most '200.0', having at least one related candidate record (linked on people.people_id = candidate.people_id) with poll source equal to 'WNBC/Marist Poll' and consider rate at most '0.42'?

qa_pairs.question: Which men who are no more than 188.0 cm tall and weigh at most 83.0 have a support rate of at most 0.25 in the WNBC/Marist Poll?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.sex = 'M' AND people.weight <= 83.0 AND candidate.support_rate <= 0.25 AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.height <= 188.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with sex equal to 'M' and weight at most '83.0' and height at most '188.0', having at least one related candidate record (linked on people.people_id = candidate.people_id) with support rate at most '0.25' and poll source equal to 'WNBC/Marist Poll'?

qa_pairs.question: Which people exactly 196.0 tall have been candidates with an oppose rate exactly 0.45 on dates containing Nov 9–10?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.height = 196.0 AND candidate.date LIKE '%Nov 9–10%' AND candidate.oppose_rate = 0.45
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with height equal to '196.0', having at least one related candidate record (linked on people.people_id = candidate.people_id) with date matching '%Nov 9–10%' and oppose rate equal to '0.45'?
